content:
name: idle_think_offline
vars:
  goal: "${ENV:BRAINFLOW_GOAL}"
  topic: "${ENV:BRAINFLOW_TOPIC}"
steps:
  - name: update world model (LLM-led)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "world_model_update"
    fn: "run"
    retries: 1
    retry_delay_sec: 1
    allow_fail: true
    args:
      thinking: "minimal"
    save_as: wm

  - name: read semantic memory (offline context)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "file_read"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      rel_path: "memory/semantic/cards.md"
      max_chars: 400
    save_as: semfile

  - name: cycle manager (deterministic stage; keeps state_cycle.json fresh)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "cycle_manager"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      topic: "${vars.topic}"
    save_as: cyc

  - name: ACC monitor (anti-loop/anomaly)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "acc_monitor"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      raw: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.stage} ${vars.cyc.subgoal.why} ${vars.cyc.subgoal.next}"
      min_chars: 200
    save_as: acc

  - name: learning value judge (what to learn next)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "value_judge"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      raw: "${vars.semfile.text}"
      goal_text: "${vars.goal}"
    save_as: val

  - name: BG action suggestion (offline)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "bg_selector"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      raw: "${vars.semfile.text}"
      top_k: 3
    save_as: bg

  - name: feasibility judge (for current stage subgoal)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "feasibility_judge"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      task:
        kind: "subgoal"
        topic: "${vars.topic}"
        stage: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.stage}"
        why: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.why}"
        next: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.next}"
        needs_network: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.needs_network}"
    save_as: feas

  - name: persist episodic log
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "note_write"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      filename: "episodic/idle.md"
      text: "OFFLINE_MODE topic=${vars.topic} STAGE=${vars.cyc.subgoal.stage} FEAS=${vars.feas} ACC=${vars.acc} VALUE=${vars.val}"
    save_as: epi

  - name: emit subgoal to outbox
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "candidate_write"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      item:
        kind: "subgoal"
        topic: "${vars.topic}"
        stage: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.stage}"
        why: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.why}"
        next: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.next}"
        needs_network: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.needs_network}"
        feasibility: "${vars.feas}"
    save_as: sub

  - name: decompose subgoal into child subgoals (LLM preferred)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "htn_decompose"
    fn: "run"
    retries: 1
    retry_delay_sec: 1
    allow_fail: true
    args:
      subgoal:
        kind: "subgoal"
        topic: "${vars.topic}"
        stage: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.stage}"
        why: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.why}"
        next: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.next}"
        needs_network: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.needs_network}"
        # Optional: the parent can carry value/feasibility context for the LLM
        value: "${vars.val}"
        feasibility: "${vars.feas}"
    save_as: htn_raw

  - name: prune low-feasibility tasks (delete subtrees)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "htn_prune"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      htn: "${vars.htn_raw}"
      threshold: 2.0
    save_as: htn

  - name: emit child subgoals to outbox
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "candidate_write"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      item:
        kind: "subgoal_children"
        topic: "${vars.topic}"
        # dedup by parent id, not acc hash
        dedup_hash: "${vars.htn.parent.id}"
        parent: "${vars.htn.parent}"
        children: "${vars.htn.children}"
    save_as: sub_children

  - name: enqueue leaf tasks
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "queue_manager"
    fn: "enqueue"
    args:
      children: "${vars.htn.children}"
    save_as: q_enq

  - name: execute multiple leaf tasks (max 3) + check & prune achieved subtrees
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "batch_executor"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      max_tasks: 3
      time_budget_sec: 180
      semantic_text: "${vars.semfile.text}"
    save_as: batch

  - name: persist run packet (early; deterministic)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "run_packet_write"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      run_id: "${vars._run_id}"
      trace_path: "${vars._trace_path}"
      batch: "${vars.batch}"
      acc: "${vars.acc}"
      health: {}
    save_as: runpkt_early

  - name: emit thought packet (offline)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "candidate_write"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      item:
        kind: "thought_packet"
        topic: "${vars.topic}"
        dedup_hash: "${vars.acc.hash}"
        stage: "${vars.cyc.subgoal.stage}"
        takeaway: "离线模式：当前子目标=${vars.cyc.subgoal.stage}。本轮尽力执行了多条叶子子目标（<=3），并对达成的目标子树做了裁剪。"
        sources: "(offline: memory/semantic/cards.md)"
        world_model: "${vars.wm.path}"
        value: "${vars.val}"
        bg_actions: "${vars.bg.actions}"
        acc: "${vars.acc}"
        note: "深度思考离线想法包：为降低 Windows 命令行参数过长风险，本条不再内嵌完整 subgoal_tree/executed 细节，可在 run_packet 中查看。"
    save_as: out

  - name: learn/update strategies (LLM-led)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "strategy_learn"
    fn: "run"
    retries: 1
    retry_delay_sec: 1
    allow_fail: true
    args:
      thinking: "minimal"
    save_as: strat

  - name: self-modify propose small change set (LLM-led)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "self_modify"
    fn: "propose_change"
    retries: 1
    retry_delay_sec: 1
    allow_fail: true
    args:
      goal: "Improve BrainFlow execution success: reduce LLM JSON parse failures; ensure doer-mode; make workflow robust and self-improving."
      thinking: "minimal"
    save_as: change_set

  - name: self-modify apply sandbox + smoke test + promote (if enabled)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "self_modify"
    fn: "apply_and_test"
    retries: 1
    retry_delay_sec: 1
    allow_fail: true
    args:
      change_set_path: "${vars.change_set.path}"
    save_as: sm_apply

  - name: memory curation + forgetting (LLM-led, dual vector stores)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "memory_curation"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      run_id: "${vars._run_id}"
      trace_path: "${vars._trace_path}"
      thinking: "minimal"
    save_as: memcur

  - name: scan progress (local)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "progress_scan"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      max_changes: 30
    save_as: scan

  - name: health monitor (detect runtime problems)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "health_monitor"
    fn: "run"
    args: {}
    save_as: health

  - name: persist run packet (deterministic)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "run_packet_write"
    fn: "run"
    args:
      run_id: "${vars._run_id}"
      trace_path: "${vars._trace_path}"
      batch: "${vars.batch}"
      acc: "${vars.acc}"
      health: "${vars.health}"
    save_as: runpkt

  - name: emit last error as self-repair report (if any)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "emit_last_error"
    fn: "run"
    allow_fail: true
    args:
      last_error: "${vars._last_error}"
      run_id: "${vars._run_id}"
      trace_path: "${vars._trace_path}"
    save_as: last_err_emit

  - name: proactive LLM judge + WhatsApp notify (major progress / social ping)
    kind: plugin
    plugin: "proactive_llm_notify"
    fn: "run"
    retries: 1
    retry_delay_sec: 1
    allow_fail: true
    args:
      progress_scan: "${vars.scan}"
      health: "${vars.health}"
      thinking: "minimal"
    save_as: proactive
